heading: Interest of Members of Congress
label: 714l Interest of Members of Congress
text: The provisions of shall apply to all contracts or agreements of the Corporation, except contracts or agreements of a kind which the Corporation may enter into with farmers participating in a program of the Corporation.section 6306(a) of title 41
